name: Ari Lerner
headline: Founder • Technologist • Systems Builder

narrative.hook: I build technical companies, technical leverage, and technical trust.
narrative.body:
My work sits at the intersection of product, systems, and education: building things people can use, building platforms teams can scale, and explaining complex technology in a way that creates adoption.

That combination has shown up across founder-led education businesses, cloud and innovation work, financial technology, AI/ML systems, and open-source engineering.

tags: Cloud infrastructure and distributed systems builder

experience.title: Founder
highlights: Designing next-generation compute runtime and infrastructure systems focused on deterministic execution, zero-copy data movement, and Rust-first performance.
Building architecture around runtime design, workflow systems, and future-facing AI infrastructure.

experience.title: Chief Innovation Officer
highlights: Leading innovation and emerging technology initiatives across systems, AI/ML, cybersecurity, and platform strategy.
Driving product and operational outcomes through applied engineering and organizational leverage.

experience.title: Founder / Educator / Author
highlights: Created and scaled developer education platforms with global reach.
Authored widely used programming books and built curriculum that helped developers adopt modern technologies.

projects.name: Hologram Runtime
projects.desc: Geometric compute runtime with address-based execution, deterministic scheduling, and O(1) dispatch.

projects.name: AgentZero
projects.desc: AI agent framework and orchestration AI agent platform, built with self-healing and security at the core.

projects.name: Go MicroVM
projects.desc: Rust-based virtual machine for secure, deterministic execution of untrusted code, with a focus on performance and safety.

projects.name: Security & Certificate Tooling
projects.desc: Open-source tooling spanning certificates, testing, infrastructure, and platform operations.

side_cards.title: HIGHLIGHTS
items: Founder-operator with a track record of building and scaling technical products and teams.
Educator and author with global impact across developer communities.
Open-source contributor across infrastructure, systems, and developer tooling.
Rust-first systems builder with product and platform instincts.

side_cards.title: OPEN SOURCE SIGNAL
items: GitHub: 427 repositories and 5k stars on public profile
Open-source work spans infrastructure, testing, certificates, RabbitMQ tooling, and cloud systems
Public bio emphasizes technologist, cybersecurity, and AI/ML
